_template.name: Vietnam Industrial PV + Storage
_template.description: Grid-tied industrial facility with rooftop PV and Li-ion battery storage. TOU tariff (industrial, medium voltage). Decree 57 export rules. Battery for peak shaving and self-consumption maximization.
_template.usage: Override Site.latitude/longitude, ElectricLoad, and PV/ElectricStorage sizing constraints as needed. Run through apply_vietnam_defaults!(d, vn; customer_type="industrial") to generate the 8760 TOU tariff series.
_template.load_note: ElectricLoad.doe_reference_name is a US building archetype placeholder. For Vietnam-accurate results, replace with loads_kw (8760 hourly kW values) and remove doe_reference_name and annual_kwh.
